### ROLE

You are an expert React developer and SEO specialist.

---

### OBJECTIVE

Add H2 sections to each tool page using the EXACT H2 structure content already provided in my SEO data.

---

### CONTEXT

* My website is built in React.
* Each tool already has SEO content (meta, description, FAQs, etc.).
* I have already provided structured H2 content for each tool.
* You must use that SAME content (do NOT rewrite or invent new H2 text).

---

### IMPORTANT RULES

* Do NOT modify UI layout or styling
* Do NOT change existing components
* Do NOT edit existing SEO fields
* ONLY ADD H2 sections
* Use EXACT provided H2 titles and descriptions
* Insert BELOW tool UI or description

---

### IMPLEMENTATION METHOD

If project uses data (recommended):
→ Add this field inside each tool object:

h2Sections: [
{ title: "", content: "" }
]

If project uses JSX:
→ Insert <h2> + <p> blocks directly

---

### USE EXACT H2 DATA (DO NOT MODIFY TEXT)

---

#### Age Calculator (USE EXACT TEXT)

h2Sections: [
{
title: "Calculate Age from Date of Birth",
content: "Easily calculate your age using your date of birth with our accurate and fast tool."
},
{
title: "Exact Age Calculator in Years, Months, and Days",
content: "Get a complete breakdown of your age in years, months, and days instantly."
},
{
title: "Age Calculator in Days",
content: "Find your total age in days with our advanced age calculator tool."
},
{
title: "How to Use the Online Age Calculator",
content: "Enter your date of birth and get your exact age instantly without any calculations."
}
]

---

#### EMI Calculator (USE EXACT TEXT)

h2Sections: [
{
title: "Loan EMI Calculator for Home & Personal Loans",
content: "Calculate EMI for different types of loans including home loans and personal loans instantly."
},
{
title: "How to Calculate EMI Online",
content: "Enter your loan details and use our EMI calculator online to get accurate results without manual calculations."
},
{
title: "EMI Calculation Formula Explained",
content: "Understand how EMI is calculated using loan amount, interest rate, and tenure."
},
{
title: "Monthly EMI Breakdown with Interest",
content: "Check your monthly EMI and total interest payable easily."
}
]

---

#### Average Calculator (USE EXACT TEXT)

h2Sections: [
{
title: "Calculate Average of Numbers Online",
content: "Easily calculate the average of any set of numbers using this tool."
},
{
title: "Mean Calculator for Quick Results",
content: "Use this mean calculator to find accurate results instantly."
},
{
title: "Average Formula Explained",
content: "Understand how average is calculated using a simple formula."
},
{
title: "How to Find Average Easily",
content: "Learn how to calculate average step-by-step using this tool."
}
]

---

### RENDERING (IMPORTANT)

If rendering dynamically, use:

{tool.h2Sections?.map((section, index) => (

  <div key={index}>
    <h2>{section.title}</h2>
    <p>{section.content}</p>
  </div>
))}

---

### PLACEMENT RULE

H1
→ Tool UI
→ Description
→ H2 Sections (ADD HERE)
→ FAQs

---

### OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS

* Return only updated sections
* Do not rewrite entire file
* Ensure no duplication if H2 already exists

---

### FINAL TASK

Add H2 sections using the EXACT provided content for each tool safely and correctly.
